title: notifications core — scheduled tasks
description: Cron-driven core work: digest windows, retention expunge, delivery reconciliation, registry cache warm.

entries.name: digest-daily-windows
entries.purpose: Every hour on the hour, check for users whose local 08:00 window has just passed + trigger daily digest processing for them. Timezone-aware per user's timezone.

entries.name: digest-weekly-windows
entries.purpose: Every Monday, every hour, check for users whose local Monday 09:00 has just passed + trigger weekly digest processing.

entries.name: expunge-archived-notifications
entries.purpose: Hard-delete Notification rows past retention window. Batched by tenant to spread load. 02:15 UTC to avoid US + EU business hours.

entries.name: reconcile-deliveries
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes, re-poll each channel module's reconciliation endpoint to catch missed provider webhooks. Cost: one API call per active provider per run — negligible.

entries.name: warm-registry-caches
entries.purpose: Every 30 minutes, refresh the category + template registry caches proactively. Belt-and-braces on top of on-demand loads — keeps the caches consistent across worker restarts.
